text:
Created attachment 253426
[PATCH] mail/cyrus-imapd310: fix 'pkg -r' install

(In reply to Hajimu UMEMOTO from comment #1)

I understand your feedback for the patch from the review. I have reverted the cleanup changes and attached a new patch to this bug. The 'pkg -r install' bug still exists and needs to be fixed, so this patch addresses only that. Does this one look ok?
